subject: Potential audition and chat about my short film!!!
body:
Hei Liis — I'd love to chat about a short film I'm directing. u free this week? thx!

Best,
Karl

Hi Juhan! I'm putting together a reading for a new stage piece in Tartu. u available next Tue?

- Karl

subject: Invite to table read
body: Hi Maria-Liisa, would love to invite you to a table read. thx!!!
